subject: TSL Daily — Mar 23, 2026
html:
TSL Daily — Monday, March 23, 2026

Meetings

Sam / David (+Gautam @Inuka) (9:30 AM)

  • Reviewed Gotham/Anuka’s fund two positioning — MOIC at 1.05x but one portfolio co just closed a Series A at 4.7x over entry; five companies actively raising. David still planning a small check. Key gap: they haven’t conveyed portfolio momentum compellingly in LP comms.
  • Pitch deck triage is being optimized to ~45 seconds (from 2–3 min) using five parallel agents and lower-cost models for signal extraction; heavy testing coming soon. Sam to add David to the GitHub repo.
  • Charlotte compensation took shape: equity (50bps, path to 1%) plus $1K/month cash are both must-haves; David leading that conversation. LLC founding-member framing on the table. What her help looks like: product insights, Burgiss data sharing, intros, and Emerging LPs collaboration.
  • Community notes strategy: now prioritize populating funds we have no notes on, not just enriching known ones.
  • Research reset underway — 220+ funds after deduplication; Sam re-doing the framework and sending David documentation and prompts to parallelize fund enrichment.

TSL/Allocator Ideas Brief (1:00 PM) — Sam, David, Charlotte (delayed)

  • Charlotte’s flight was delayed — today’s meeting pushed, rescheduled for later this week (30 min). Demo commitment moves with it.
  • New funds page pushed live; needs refinement and research population before it’s ready to show.
  • Annabella (NY) event format still open: dinner for 10 at $5K preferred (more intimate, SF model worked), happy hour fallback at $3K if budget forces it (3x attendance but less depth). Decision pending final budget.
  • Dave Lou introduction (Hyphen Capital) — raising a fund of funds, large public presence; follow-up conversation pending.
  • Pitch deck limitations concept: identify flaws/restrictions, surface as open questions in community notes — more opinionated than anything else out there.
  • Allocator scoring idea: use Charlotte’s 1–5 framework as training data, segment predictions by archetype (HNW, family office, pension/large FO, endowment).

Open Tasks

No TASKS.md found — pulled from today’s meeting notes.

Sam:

  • Finalize pitch deck triage and schedule Charlotte demo (this week)
  • Send David research documentation, prompts, and combined fund spreadsheet
  • Add David to GitHub repo for pitch deck co-development
  • Complete funds page refinement

David:

  • Lead Charlotte compensation conversation (equity + $1K/month, LLC founding member path)
  • Execute fund research using Sam’s prompts (batch 5–10 funds at a time)
  • Ask Peter Walker about Carta data-sharing possibilities
  • Finalize Annabella event format and budget decision

Waiting on:

  • Charlotte: verbal agreement on compensation and advisory scope before product access
  • Charlotte: reschedule confirmation for pitch deck demo (later this week)

Suggested Priorities for Tomorrow

  1. [product] Ship pitch deck triage and lock in Charlotte’s demo time — today’s meeting slipped due to her flight delay, which means there’s a window to nail the 45-second experience before she sees it. This is still the unlock for her formal advisory buy-in and LP introductions.
  2. [gtm] David closes Charlotte compensation — verbal agreement this week — equity + $1K/month + LLC founding member path is defined; the goal is a handshake before the demo so access and introductions can start moving immediately after.
  3. [product] Sam sends research docs to David and creates combined fund spreadsheet — 220+ funds is a real asset but only if David can actually enrich them in parallel. Getting him the prompts and structure unblocks the data layer and the funds page in one move.

Sam / David (+Gautam @Inuka) (Mar 23, 2026) · TSL/Allocator Ideas Brief (Mar 23, 2026)
